# WhiskeyRiver TX - Texas Alcohol Market Intelligence

> WhiskeyRiver TX is a SaaS platform providing Texas alcohol market intelligence for beverage distributors and sales reps. It combines TABC data with CRM tools, GPS field verification, and analytics.

## Pages
- [Home](https://whiskeyrivertx.com/): Landing page with product overview and hero content
- [Platform](https://whiskeyrivertx.com/product): SaaS platform details - enriched LP license data, B2B portals, market intelligence
- [LP License Directory](https://whiskeyrivertx.com/directory): Free searchable directory of all 1,119 Texas LP package store licenses
- [County Intelligence](https://whiskeyrivertx.com/insights): Wet/dry county analysis - 67 counties with zero liquor stores, market gaps
- [Download](https://whiskeyrivertx.com/download): Download enriched LP license dataset
- [Blog](https://whiskeyrivertx.com/blog): Monthly market reviews, top new accounts, venue spotlights
- [SaaS App](https://app.whiskeyrivertx.com): The SaaS platform login

## Key Data
- 1,119 active Texas LP (package store) licenses tracked
- 3.6M+ mixed beverage receipt records
- 254 Texas counties analyzed
- 67 counties identified with zero liquor stores
- Monthly data updates from Texas Comptroller

## Related Sites
- [ThirstMetrics](https://thirstmetrics.com): Parent company - beverage industry software suite
- [PowerfulThirst](https://powerfulthirst.com): Industry news and resources
- [TABC](https://www.tabc.texas.gov): Texas Alcoholic Beverage Commission
- [Texas Comptroller](https://comptroller.texas.gov): Source of mixed beverage receipt data
